name: Karethos
bio: Known as The Dragon Lord, Karethos once walked among mortals disguised as an elderly man in regal bronze robes. Beneath his human guise, he is a full dragon, with massive bronze wings and crowned horns. Motivated by a belief that only through Enoch's alliance can his kind survive, Karethos turns against his former allies. Though powerful, his heart bears the heavy weariness of centuries of struggle. His clashes with Draven reveal a deep sadness beneath his betrayal, suggesting a once-noble being driven to desperate measures.
The Dragon Lord; battles Draven but is ultimately spared and allowed to retreat.
